en: Why don't you tell me what's going on?
ja: 何が起きてるか教えてよ。
zhTW: 你何不告訴我發生了什麼事？
vi: Sao ban khong noi cho toi biet chuyen gi dang xay ra?

en: Why don't you tell me who's on the phone?
ja: 電話の相手を教えてよ。
zhTW: 你何不告訴我電話那頭是誰？
vi: Sao ban khong noi cho toi biet ai dang goi?

en: Why don't you ask him what's going wrong?
ja: 何がうまくいかないのか聞いてみたら？
zhTW: 你何不問他出了什麼問題？
vi: Sao ban khong hoi anh ay co gi sai?

en: Why don't you ask him when there's storms?
ja: 嵐が来た時に聞いてみたら？
zhTW: 你何不問他暴風雨來的時候呢？
vi: Sao ban khong hoi anh ay khi co bao?

en: Don't say that you love me.
ja: 愛してるなんて言わないで。
vi: Dung noi rang ban yeu toi.
